Descryption: Ensure that 'Restrict non-admin users from creating tents' is set to 'Yes'
Recommencdation: Set 'Restrict non-admin users from creating tents' to 'Yes'

Descryption:
Ensure that 'Legacy Authentication' is blocked by at least one of following option:
  - Conditional Access Policy
  - Enforced 'Security Defaults' on tent
or: 
  - Disabled IMAP, SMTP, POP3 protocols in Exchange Online
  - Blocked Legacy Authentication for Sharepoint and OneDrive
Result: Legacy authentication is blocked by Conditional Access or Security Defaults
Expected_Value: All Legacy Authentication protocols are blocked or disabled
Recommencdation:
1. Create Contitional Access Policy that block all 'Legacy Authentication' protocols
2. Enable 'Security defaults' on tent level
3. Disable POP3, IMAP, SMTP for Exchange and Legacy authentication for Sharepoint and OneDrive

Descryption: Ensure that 'Users consent for applications' is set to 'Do not allow user consent'
Recommencdation: Set 'Users consent for applications' to 'Do not allow user consent'

Descryption: Ensure that 'Users can register applications' is set to 'No'
Recommencdation: Set 'Users can register applications' is set to 'No'

Descryption: Ensure that 'Guest user access' is set to 'Guest user access is restricted to properties and memberships of their own directory objects (most restrictive)'

Descryption: Ensure that 'Require write permissions for creating new management groups' is set to 'Yes'

Descryption: Ensure Security Defaults (only if Conditional Access Policies is disabled)is enabled on Microsoft Entra ID
Result: Enabled CA policies: 0; Security Defaults enabled: True
Expected_Value: Enabled if no conditional access polcies in place
Recommencdation: Enable Security Defaults on Azure AD if Conditional Access policies are not in use. In other cases is recommended to disable Security Defaults to avoid conflicts
